title: SYNC: Everything, Everywhere
stripped_text: click: Flip this identity. The Runner pays 1 credit more when spending a click to remove a tag (not through a card ability). Flip side: click: Flip this identity. You may pay 2 credits fewer when spending a click to trash a resource (not through a card ability).

title: Team Sponsorship
stripped_text: Whenever you score an agenda, you may install a card from Archives or HQ, ignoring the install cost.

title: Tech Startup
stripped_text: When your turn begins, you may trash Tech Startup. If you do, search R&D for an asset, reveal it, and install it. Shuffle R&D.

title: Tenma Line
stripped_text: click: Swap 2 pieces of installed ice.

title: Tennin Institute: The Secrets Within
stripped_text: When your turn begins, if the Runner did not make a successful run during their last turn, you may place 1 advancement counter on an installed card.

title: The All-Seeing I
stripped_text: Play only if the Runner is tagged. Trash all resources. The Runner can remove 1 bad publicity to prevent this.

title: The Foundry: Refining the Process
stripped_text: The first time you rez a piece of ice each turn, you may search R&D for another copy of that ice, reveal it, and add it to HQ. Shuffle R&D.

title: The Future Perfect
stripped_text: When the Runner accesses this agenda while it is not installed, play a Psi Game. (Players secretly bid 0-2[credit]. Then each player reveals and spends their bid.) If the bids differ, the Runner cannot steal this agenda during this access.

title: Thomas Haas
stripped_text: Thomas Haas can be advanced. trash: Gain 2 credits for each advancement token on Thomas Haas.

title: Thoth
stripped_text: When the Runner encounters this ice, give them 1 tag. Subroutine Trace[4]. If successful, do 1 net damage for each tag the Runner has. Subroutine Trace[4]. If successful, the Runner loses 1 credit for each tag they have.

title: TL;DR
stripped_text: Subroutine When the Runner encounters the next piece of ice during this run, that ice gains a second copy of each subroutine on it (after the original subroutine) for the remainder of the encounter.

title: Tollbooth
stripped_text: When the Runner encounters this ice, they must pay 3 credits, if able. If they do not, end the run. Subroutine End the run.

title: Tori Hanzō
stripped_text: Interrupt -> The first time you would do 1 or more net damage during each run against this server, instead you may pay 2 credits to do 1 core damage.

title: Turnpike
stripped_text: When the Runner encounters this ice, they lose 1 credit. Subroutine Trace[5]. If successful, give the Runner 1 tag.

title: Tyr's Hand
stripped_text: Interrupt -> When a subroutine would be broken on a piece of bioroid ice protecting this server, you may rez this upgrade. Interrupt -> trash: Prevent 1 subroutine from being broken on a piece of bioroid ice protecting this server.

title: Valley Grid
stripped_text: Whenever the Runner fully breaks a piece of ice protecting this server, they get -1 maximum hand size until the beginning of your next turn. Limit 1 region per server.

title: Victoria Jenkins
stripped_text: The Runner gets -1 allotted click for each of their turns. When this asset is trashed from anywhere while being accessed, add it to the Runner's score area as an agenda worth 2 agenda points.

title: Viktor 1.0
stripped_text: Lose click: Break 1 subroutine on this ice. Only the Runner can use this ability. Subroutine Do 1 core damage. Subroutine End the run.

title: Viktor 2.0
stripped_text: Lose click click: Break up to 2 subroutines on this ice. Only the Runner can use this ability. Hosted power counter: Do 1 core damage. Subroutine Trace[2]. If successful, place 1 power counter on this ice. Subroutine End the run.

title: Wall of Static
stripped_text: Subroutine End the run.

title: Wall of Thorns
stripped_text: Subroutine Do 2 net damage. Subroutine End the run.

title: Weyland Consortium: Builder of Nations
stripped_text: The first time each turn an encounter with an advanced piece of ice ends, do 1 meat damage.

title: Weyland Consortium: Building a Better World
stripped_text: Whenever you play a transaction operation, gain 1 credit.
sortable_title: weyland consortium: building a better world

title: Zaibatsu Loyalty
stripped_text: Interrupt -> When a card would be exposed, you may rez this asset. Interrupt -> 1 credit or trash: Prevent 1 card from being exposed.

title: Zed 1.0
stripped_text: Lose click: Break 1 subroutine on this ice. Only the Runner can use this ability. Subroutine If the Runner has lost click to break a subroutine during this run, do 1 core damage. Subroutine If the Runner has lost click to break a subroutine during this run, do 1 core damage.

title: 15 Minutes
stripped_text: click: Shuffle 15 Minutes into R&D. The Corp can trigger this ability while 15 Minutes is in the Runner's score area. Limit 1 per deck.

title: 24/7 News Cycle
stripped_text: As an additional cost to play 24/7 News Cycle, forfeit an agenda. Resolve the "when scored" ability on an agenda in your score area.

title: Access to Globalsec
stripped_text: +1 link

title: Account Siphon
stripped_text: Run HQ. If successful, instead of breaching HQ, you may force the Corp to lose up to 5 credits, then you gain 2 credits for each credit lost and take 2 tags.

title: Adam: Compulsive Hacker
stripped_text: You start the game with 3 different directive cards installed (these cards are not considered part of your deck).

title: Adjusted Chronotype
stripped_text: The first time each turn you lose click except by paying the trigger cost of a paid ability, gain click.

title: Aesop’s Pawnshop
stripped_text: When your turn begins, you may trash 1 of your other installed cards. If you do, gain 3 credits.

title: Akamatsu Mem Chip
stripped_text: +1 mu

title: Alias
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine. 2 credits: +3 strength. This program cannot interface with ice protecting a remote server.

title: Alice Merchant: Clan Agitator
stripped_text: The first time you make a successful run on Archives each turn, the Corp must trash 1 card from HQ.

title: Always Be Running
stripped_text: The first click you spend each turn must be spent to take the basic action to play an event or the basic action to run a server. You cannot take the action to play an event this way except if you play a run event. Once per turn -> Lose click click: Break 1 subroutine.

title: Apex: Invasive Predator
stripped_text: You cannot install non-virtual resources. When your turn begins, you may install 1 card from your grip facedown.

title: Apocalypse
stripped_text: Play only if you made a successful run on HQ, R&D and Archives this turn. Trash all installed Corp cards. Turn all installed Runner cards facedown.

title: Armitage Codebusting
stripped_text: Place 12 credits from the bank on Armitage Codebusting when it is installed. When there are no credits left on Armitage Codebusting, trash it. click: Take 2 credits from Armitage Codebusting.

title: Atman
stripped_text: When you install this program, you may spend any number of credits to place that many power counters on it. This program gets +1 strength for each hosted power counter, and it can only interface with ice of exactly equal strength. Interface -> 1[credit]: Break 1 subroutine.

title: Aurora
stripped_text: Interface -> 2 credits: Break 1 barrier subroutine. 2 credits: +3 strength.

title: Baba Yaga
stripped_text: You may host any number of non-AI icebreaker programs on this program. This program gains the paid abilities of all hosted icebreaker programs.

title: Bank Job
stripped_text: When you install this resource, load 8 credits on it. When it is empty, trash it. Whenever you make a successful run on a remote server, instead of breaching that server, you may take any number of credits from this resource.

title: Battering Ram
stripped_text: Interface -> 2 credits: Break up to 2 barrier subroutines. 1 credit: +1 strength for the remainder of this run.

title: Black Orchestra
stripped_text: Whenever you encounter a code gate, you may install this program from your heap. 3 credits: +2 strength. Then, if this program can interface with the code gate you are encountering, break up to 2 subroutines.

title: Borrowed Satellite
stripped_text: +1 link Your maximum hand size is increased by 1.

title: Brain Chip
stripped_text: +X mu Your maximum hand size is increased by X. X is equal to the number of agenda points you have. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Breach
stripped_text: Interface -> 2 credits: Break up to 3 barrier subroutines. 2 credits: +4 strength. This program cannot interface with ice protecting a remote server.

title: Bug
stripped_text: Install only if you made a successful run on HQ this turn. Whenever the Corp draws a card, you may pay 2 credits to reveal that card.

title: Calling in Favors
stripped_text: Gain 1 credit for each installed connection resource.

title: Chakana
stripped_text: Whenever you make a successful run on R&D, place 1 virus counter on Chakana. If there are at least 3 virus counters on Chakana, the advancement requirement of all agendas is increased by 1.

title: Chaos Theory: Wünderkind
stripped_text: +1 mu

title: Charlatan
stripped_text: click click: Run any server. The first time you approach a rezzed piece of ice during this run, you may pay credits equal to the strength of that ice. If you do, when you encounter that ice after this approach, bypass it.

title: Cloak
stripped_text: 1 recurring credit Use this credit to pay for using icebreakers.

title: Clone Chip
stripped_text: trash: Install a program from your heap (paying the install cost).

title: Clot
stripped_text: The Corp cannot score an agenda during the same turn they installed that agenda. When the Corp purges virus counters, trash this program.

title: Cold Read
stripped_text: Place 4 credits on this event, then run any server. You can spend hosted credits during that run. When that run ends, trash 1 installed program you used during that run. Trashing a program this way cannot be prevented.

title: Corroder
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 barrier subroutine. 1 credit: +1 strength.

title: Crash Space
stripped_text: 2[recurring-credit] You can spend hosted credits to take the basic action to remove 1 tag. Interrupt -> trash: Prevent up to 3 meat damage.

title: Crypsis
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 subroutine. 1 credit: +1 strength. click: Place 1 virus counter on this program. Whenever an encounter ends, if you used this program to break a subroutine during that encounter, remove 1 hosted virus counter or trash this program.

title: Cyber-Cypher
stripped_text: When you install this program, choose a server. Use this program only during runs on the chosen server. Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 code gate subroutine. 1 credit: +1 strength.

title: Cyberfeeder
stripped_text: 1 recurring credit Use this credit to pay for using icebreakers or for installing virus programs.

title: Dagger
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine. 1 credit: +5 strength. Use this ability only by spending a credit from a stealth card.

title: Daily Casts
stripped_text: When you install this resource, load 8 credits onto it. When it is empty, trash it. When your turn begins, take 2 credits from this resource.

title: Data Dealer
stripped_text: click, forfeit 1 agenda: Gain 9 credits.

title: Datasucker
stripped_text: Whenever you make a successful run on a central server, place 1 virus counter on Datasucker. Hosted virus counter: Rezzed piece of ice currently being encountered has -1 strength until the end of the encounter.

title: Decoy
stripped_text: Interrupt -> trash: Prevent 1 tag.

title: Déjà Vu
stripped_text: Add 1 card (or up to 2 virus cards) from your heap to your grip.

title: Demolition Run
stripped_text: Run HQ or R&D. Access -> 0 credits: Trash the card you are accessing.

title: Desperado
stripped_text: +1 mu Gain 1 credit whenever you make a successful run. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Diesel
stripped_text: Draw 3 cards.

title: Dirty Laundry
stripped_text: Run any server. When that run ends, if it was successful, gain 5 credits.

title: Djinn
stripped_text: Djinn can host up to 3 mu of non-icebreaker programs. The memory costs of hosted programs do not count against your memory limit. click, 1 credit: Search your stack for a virus program, reveal it, and add it to your grip. Shuffle your stack.

title: Donut Taganes
stripped_text: The play cost of operations and events is increased by 1.

title: Dr. Lovegood
stripped_text: When your turn begins, choose 1 of your installed cards. That card loses its printed abilities for the remainder of the turn.

title: Early Bird
stripped_text: Play only as your first click. Gain click. Run any server.

title: Earthrise Hotel
stripped_text: When you install this resource, load 3 power counters onto it. When it is empty, trash it. When your turn begins, remove 1 hosted power counter and draw 2 cards.

title: Easy Mark
stripped_text: Gain 3 credits.

title: Ele "Smoke" Scovak: Cynosure of the Net
stripped_text: 1 recurring credit Use this credit to pay for using icebreakers.

title: Employee Strike
stripped_text: This event is not trashed until another current is played or an agenda is scored. The Corp's identity loses its printed abilities.

title: Endless Hunger
stripped_text: Interface -> Trash 1 installed card: Break 1 "Subroutine End the run." subroutine.

title: Enhanced Vision
stripped_text: The first time you make a successful run each turn, the Corp reveals 1 card at random from HQ.

title: Equivocation
stripped_text: Whenever you make a successful run on R&D, you may reveal the top card of R&D. If you do, you may force the Corp to draw that card.

title: Escher
stripped_text: Run HQ. If successful, instead of breaching HQ, rearrange any number of ice protecting all servers. (Do not rez or derez any ice or change the number of ice protecting any server.)

title: Exile: Streethawk
stripped_text: Whenever you install a program from your heap, draw 1 card.

title: Exploratory Romp
stripped_text: Run any server. If successful, instead of breaching that server, remove up to 3 advancement counters from 1 card in the root of or protecting the attacked server.

title: Express Delivery
stripped_text: Look at the top 4 cards of your stack and add 1 of those cards to your grip. Shuffle your stack.

title: Feedback Filter
stripped_text: Interrupt -> 3 credits: Prevent 1 net damage. Interrupt -> trash: Prevent up to 2 core damage.

title: Feint
stripped_text: Run HQ. The first 2 times this run you encounter a piece of ice, bypass that ice. If successful, you cannot breach HQ.

title: Femme Fatale
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine. 2 credits: +1 strength. When you install this program, choose 1 installed piece of ice. Whenever you encounter the chosen ice, you may pay 1 credit for each subroutine it has. If you do, bypass that ice.

title: Find the Truth
stripped_text: Whenever you draw a card, reveal that card. The first time each turn you make a successful run, you may look at the top card of R&D.

title: First Responders
stripped_text: 2 credits: Draw 1 card. Use this ability only if you have suffered damage from a Corp card ability this turn.

title: Forged Activation Orders
stripped_text: Choose 1 unrezzed piece of ice. The Corp may rez that ice. If they do not, they trash it.

title: Freelance Coding Contract
stripped_text: Trash up to 5 programs from your grip. Gain 2 credits for each program trashed.

title: Gabriel Santiago: Consummate Professional
stripped_text: The first time you make a successful run on HQ each turn, gain 2 credits.

title: Gene Conditioning Shoppe
stripped_text: Genetics also trigger the second time each turn their trigger condition is met.

title: Gingerbread
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 tracer subroutine. 2 credits: +3 strength.

title: Globalsec Security Clearance
stripped_text: Install only if you have at least 2 link. When your turn begins, you may lose click. If you do, look at the top card of R&D.

title: Gordian Blade
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 code gate subroutine. 1 credit: +1 strength for the remainder of this run.

title: Grappling Hook
stripped_text: trash: Break all but 1 subroutine on a piece of ice.

title: Grimoire
stripped_text: +2 mu Whenever you install a virus program, place 1 virus counter on that program. Limit 1 console per player.

title: GS Sherman M3
stripped_text: If you have at least 2 link, the memory cost of this program is 0 mu, even if it is not installed. Interface -> 2 credits: Break any number of barrier subroutines. 2 credits: +3 strength.

title: GS Shrike M2
stripped_text: If you have at least 2 link, the memory cost of this program is 0 mu, even if it is not installed. Interface -> 2 credits: Break any number of sentry subroutines. 2 credits: +3 strength.

title: GS Striker M1
stripped_text: If you have at least 2 link, the memory cost of this program is 0 mu, even if it is not installed. Interface -> 2 credits: Break any number of code gate subroutines. 2 credits: +3 strength.

title: Harbinger
stripped_text: Interrupt -> When this program would be trashed, turn it facedown instead of adding it to your heap. (It is still considered trashed.)

title: Hayley Kaplan: Universal Scholar
stripped_text: The first time you install a card each turn, you may install another card of the same type from your grip (paying its install cost).

title: Heartbeat
stripped_text: +1 mu Interrupt -> Trash 1 of your installed cards: Prevent 1 damage. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Houdini
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 code gate subroutine. 2 credits: +4 strength for the remainder of this run. Use this ability only by spending at least 1 credit from a stealth card.

title: Hunting Grounds
stripped_text: Interrupt, once per turn -> 0[credit]: Prevent a "when encountered" ability on a piece of ice. trash: Install the top 3 cards of your stack facedown.

title: Iain Stirling: Retired Spook
stripped_text: When your turn begins, gain 2 credits if the Corp has more scored agenda points than you.

title: Ice Analyzer
stripped_text: Whenever the Corp rezzes a piece of ice, place 1 credit on Ice Analyzer. You may use credits on Ice Analyzer to install programs.

title: Ice Carver
stripped_text: While you are encountering a piece of ice, it gets -1 strength.

title: Independent Thinking
stripped_text: Trash up to 5 of your installed cards. Draw 1 card for each card trashed (or 2 cards for each card trashed if you trashed at least 1 directive).

title: Infiltration
stripped_text: Gain 2 credits or expose 1 card.

title: Inject
stripped_text: Reveal the top 4 cards of your stack and trash all programs revealed. Gain 1 credit for each program trashed, and add the rest of the revealed cards to your grip.

title: Inside Job
stripped_text: Run any server. The first time you encounter a piece of ice during that run, bypass it.

title: Interdiction
stripped_text: This card is not trashed until another current is played or an agenda is scored. The Corp cannot rez non-ice cards during the Runner's turn.

title: Inti
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 barrier subroutine. 2 credits: +1 strength for the remainder of this run.

title: I've Had Worse
stripped_text: Draw 3 cards. Whenever I've Had Worse is trashed by taking net or meat damage, draw 3 cards.

title: Jak Sinclair
stripped_text: Reduce the cost to install Jak Sinclair by 1 for each link you have. When your turn begins, you may make a run. You cannot use programs during this run.

stripped_text: Interrupt -> The first time each run you would take 1 or more tags, prevent 1 tag.

stripped_text: Lower the install cost of the first program or piece of hardware you install each turn by 1.

title: Ken “Express” Tenma: Disappeared Clone
stripped_text: The first time each turn you play a run event, gain 1 credit.

title: Khan: Savvy Skiptracer
stripped_text: The first time you pass a piece of ice each turn, you may install an icebreaker from your hand, lowering the install cost by 1.

title: Laramy Fisk: Savvy Investor
stripped_text: The first time you make a successful run on a central server each turn, you may force the Corp to draw 1 card.

title: Leela Patel: Trained Pragmatist
stripped_text: Whenever an agenda is scored or stolen, add 1 unrezzed card to HQ.

title: Legwork
stripped_text: Run HQ. If successful, access 2 additional cards when you breach HQ.

title: Lemuria Codecracker
stripped_text: click, 1 credit: Expose 1 card. Use this ability only if you have made a successful run on HQ this turn.

title: Levy AR Lab Access
stripped_text: Shuffle your grip and heap into your stack. Draw 5 cards. Remove Levy AR Lab Access from the game instead of trashing it.

title: Liberated Account
stripped_text: When you install this resource, load 16 credits onto it. When it is empty, trash it. click: Take 4 credits from this resource.

title: Logos
stripped_text: +1 mu Your maximum hand size is increased by 1. Whenever the Corp scores an agenda, you may search your stack for a card and add it to your grip. Shuffle your stack. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Magnum Opus
stripped_text: click: Gain 2 credits.

title: Mass Install
stripped_text: Install up to 3 programs from your grip (paying the install costs).

title: Medium
stripped_text: Whenever you make a successful run on R&D, place 1 virus counter on this program. Whenever you breach R&D, choose a number less than the number of hosted virus counters. Access that many additional cards.

title: Mimic
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine.

title: Misdirection
stripped_text: click, click, X credits: Remove X tags.

title: MKUltra
stripped_text: Whenever you encounter a sentry, you may install this program from your heap. 3 credits: +2 strength. Then, if this program can interface with the sentry you are encountering, break up to 2 subroutines.

title: Modded
stripped_text: Install a program or piece of hardware, lowering the install cost by 3.

title: Monolith
stripped_text: +3 mu When you install this hardware, install up to 3 programs from your grip, paying 4 credits less for each. Interrupt -> Trash 1 program from your grip: Prevent 1 core damage or 1 net damage. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Multithreader
stripped_text: 2 recurring credits Use these credits to pay for using programs.

title: Nasir Meidan: Cyber Explorer
stripped_text: Whenever you encounter a piece of ice after an approach during which that ice was rezzed, lose all credits in your credit pool. Gain credits equal to the rez cost of that ice.

title: Nero Severn: Information Broker
stripped_text: Once per turn -> When you encounter a sentry, you may jack out.

title: Net Mercur
stripped_text: The first time you spend at least 1 credit from a stealth card each run, place 1 credit on Net Mercur or draw 1 card. Use credits on Net Mercur for anything.

title: Net Shield
stripped_text: Interrupt -> The first time each turn you would suffer net damage, you may pay 1 credit to prevent 1 net damage.

title: Net-Ready Eyes
stripped_text: When you install Net-Ready Eyes, suffer 2 meat damage. Whenever you initiate a run, choose an icebreaker. That icebreaker has +1 strength for the remainder of the run.

title: Neutralize All Threats
stripped_text: The first time each turn you access a card with a trash cost, reveal it. You must trash that card by paying its trash cost, if able. Whenever you breach HQ, access 1 additional card.

title: Ninja
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine. 3 credits: +5 strength.

title: Noise: Hacker Extraordinaire
stripped_text: Whenever you install a virus program, the Corp trashes the top card of R&D.

title: Null: Whistleblower
stripped_text: Once per turn -> When you encounter a piece of ice, you may trash 1 card from your grip. If you do, that ice gets -2 strength for the remainder of this run.

title: Obelus
stripped_text: +1 mu You get +1 maximum hand size for each tag you have. The first time each turn a successful run on HQ or R&D ends, draw 1 card for each time you accessed a card during that run. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Omar Keung: Conspiracy Theorist
stripped_text: Once per turn -> click: Run Archives. If that run would be declared successful, change the attacked server to HQ or R&D for the remainder of that run.

title: Omni-drive
stripped_text: Omni-drive can host a single program of 1 mu or less. The memory cost of the hosted program does not count against your memory limit. 1 recurring credit Use this credit to pay for using the hosted program.

title: On the Lam
stripped_text: Host this event on an installed resource as a condition counter with "Interrupt -> trash: Prevent up to 3 tags or up to 3 damage."

title: Oracle May
stripped_text: You cannot use this resource more than once per turn. click: Choose a card type. Reveal the top card of your stack. If that card has the chosen type, draw it and gain 2[credit]. Otherwise, trash it.

title: Overmind
stripped_text: When you install this program, place 1 power counter on it for each unused MU. (Place counters after this program's MU cost applies.) Interface -> Hosted power counter: Break 1 subroutine. 1 credit: +1 strength.

title: Paige Piper
stripped_text: The first time you install a card each turn (including Paige Piper), you may search your stack for any number of copies of that card and add them to your heap. Shuffle your stack.

title: Paperclip
stripped_text: Whenever you encounter a barrier, you may install this program from your heap. X credits: +X strength. Then, if this program can interface with the barrier you are encountering, break up to X subroutines.

title: Parasite
stripped_text: Install only on a rezzed piece of ice. When your turn begins, place 1 virus counter on this program. Host ice gets -1 strength for each hosted virus counter. When the strength of host ice is 0 or less, trash it.

title: Paricia
stripped_text: 2 recurring credits (When you install this card and before your turn begins, refill to 2 hosted credits.) You can spend hosted credits to pay trash costs of assets.

title: Passport
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 code gate subroutine. 2 credits: +2 strength. This program cannot interface with ice protecting a remote server.

title: Peregrine

title: Pipeline
stripped_text: Interface -> 1 credit: Break 1 sentry subroutine. 2 credits: +1 strength for the remainder of this run.

title: Planned Assault
stripped_text: As an additional cost to play this event, spend click. Search your stack for a run event and play that run event (paying its play cost), ignoring any additional costs. Shuffle your stack.

title: Plascrete Carapace
stripped_text: When you install this hardware, load 4 power counters onto it. When it is empty, trash it. Interrupt -> Hosted power counter: Prevent 1 meat damage.

title: Prey
stripped_text: Make a run. Once during this run, when you pass a piece of ice, you may trash a number of your installed cards equal to the strength of that ice. If you do, trash that ice.

title: Professional Contacts
stripped_text: click: Gain 1 credit and draw 1 card.

title: Progenitor
stripped_text: You can install virus programs onto this program. Limit 1 hosted program. The memory cost of the hosted program does not count against your memory limit. Interrupt -> Whenever virus counters would be purged, prevent 1 virus counter on the hosted program from being removed.

title: Public Terminal
stripped_text: 1 recurring credit Use this credit to play run events.

title: Push Your Luck
stripped_text: Secretly spend any number of credits. The Corp guesses if you spent an even or odd amount. Reveal spent credits. If the Corp guessed incorrectly, gain credits equal to twice the amount spent.

title: Q-Coherence Chip
stripped_text: +1 mu When an installed program is trashed, trash this hardware.

title: Quetzal: Free Spirit
stripped_text: Once per turn -> 0[credit]: Break 1 barrier subroutine.

title: Rabbit Hole
stripped_text: +1 link When Rabbit Hole is installed, you may search your stack for another copy of Rabbit Hole and install it by paying its install cost. Shuffle your stack.

title: Reaver
stripped_text: The first time you trash an installed card each turn, draw 1 card.

title: Reina Roja: Freedom Fighter
stripped_text: The first piece of ice the Corp rezzes each turn costs 1 credit more to rez.

title: Retrieval Run
stripped_text: Run Archives. If successful, instead of breaching Archives, you may install 1 program from your heap, ignoring all costs.

title: Rielle “Kit” Peddler: Transhuman
stripped_text: The first time each turn you encounter a piece of ice, it gains code gate for the remainder of this run.

title: Sacrificial Construct
stripped_text: Interrupt -> trash: Prevent a player from trashing 1 installed program or piece of hardware.

title: Safety First
stripped_text: Your maximum hand size is reduced by 2. When your turn ends, draw 1 card if you do not have cards in your grip equal to or greater than your maximum hand size.

title: Sahasrara
stripped_text: 2 recurring credits Use these credits to install programs (you cannot use Sahasrara to install a program that trashes Sahasrara).

title: Same Old Thing
stripped_text: click, click, trash: Play an event from your heap (paying its play cost).

title: Scavenge
stripped_text: As an additional cost to play this event, trash 1 installed program. Install 1 program from your grip or heap, paying X credits less. X is equal to the install cost of the program you trashed.

title: Security Chip
stripped_text: trash: Choose an icebreaker (or any number of cloud icebreakers). Each chosen icebreaker has +1 strength for each link you have for the remainder of this run. Use this ability only during a run.

title: Security Nexus
stripped_text: +1 mu, +1 link Once per turn -> When you encounter a piece of ice, you may have the Corp trace[5]. If successful, they give you 1 tag and end the run. If unsuccesful, bypass the encountered ice. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Security Testing
stripped_text: When your turn begins, you may choose a server. The first time each turn you make a successful run on the chosen server, instead of breaching it, gain 2 credits.

title: Silhouette: Stealth Operative
stripped_text: The first time you make a successful run on HQ each turn, you may expose 1 card.

title: Sneakdoor Beta
stripped_text: click: Run Archives. If that run would be declared successful, change the attacked server to HQ for the remainder of that run.

title: Special Order
stripped_text: Search your stack for an icebreaker, reveal it, and add it to your grip. Shuffle your stack.

title: Spike
stripped_text: If you have at least 2 link, the memory cost of this program is 0 mu, even if it is not installed. This program gets +1 strength for each installed icebreaker. Interface -> trash: Break up to 3 barrier subroutines.

title: Stimhack
stripped_text: Place 9 credits on this event, then run any server. During that run, hosted credits are considered to be in your credit pool. When that run ends, suffer 1 core damage. This damage cannot be prevented.

title: Street Peddler
stripped_text: When you install Street Peddler, host the top 3 cards of your stack facedown on Street Peddler (you may look at these cards at any time). trash: Install 1 card hosted on Street Peddler, lowering its install cost by 1.

title: Sunny Lebeau: Security Specialist
stripped_text: NA

title: Sure Gamble
stripped_text: Gain 9 credits.

title: Symmetrical Visage
stripped_text: The first time you spend click to draw 1 card (not through a card ability) each turn, gain 1 credit.

title: Synthetic Blood
stripped_text: The first time you take damage each turn, draw 1 card.

title: Technical Writer
stripped_text: Whenever you install a piece of hardware or a program, place 1 credit from the bank on Technical Writer. click,trash: Take all credits from Technical Writer.

title: Temüjin Contract
stripped_text: Choose a server and place 20 credits from the bank on Temujin Contract when you install it. When there are no credits left on Temujin Contract, trash it. Whenever you make a successful run on the chosen server, take 4 credits from Temujin Contract.

title: The Personal Touch
stripped_text: Install The Personal Touch only on an icebreaker. Host icebreaker has +1 strength.

title: The Professor: Keeper of Knowledge
stripped_text: The first copy of each program in this deck does not count against your influence limit.

title: The Source
stripped_text: The advancement requirement of all agendas is increased by 1. As an additional cost to steal an agenda, you must pay 3 credits. Trash The Source when an agenda is scored or stolen.

title: The Toolbox
stripped_text: +2 mu +2 link 2 recurring credits Use these credits to pay for using icebreakers. Limit 1 console per player.

title: Theophilius Bagbiter
stripped_text: When you install Theophilius Bagbiter, lose all credits in your credit pool. Your maximum hand size is equal to the number of credits in your credit pool.

title: Tinkering
stripped_text: Choose a piece of ice. That ice gains sentry, code gate, and barrier until the end of the turn.

title: Traffic Jam
stripped_text: This card is not trashed until another current is played or an agenda is scored. The advancement requirement of each agenda is increased by 1 for each copy of that agenda in the Corp's score area.

title: Tri-maf Contact
stripped_text: You cannot use this resource more than once per turn. click: Gain 2[credit]. When this resource is trashed, suffer 3 meat damage.

title: Unregistered S&W '35
stripped_text: Use this hardware only if you have made a successful run on HQ this turn. click click: Trash 1 rezzed bioroid, clone, executive, or sysop in the root of a remote server.

title: Wasteland
stripped_text: The first time each turn you trash 1 of your installed cards, gain 1 credit.

title: Whizzard: Master Gamer
stripped_text: 3 recurring credits Use these credits to trash cards.

title: Windfall
stripped_text: Shuffle your stack. Trash the top card of your stack. Gain X credits where X is equal to the install cost of that card.

title: Window
stripped_text: click: Draw 1 card from the bottom of your stack.

title: Wyldside
stripped_text: When your turn begins, draw 2 cards and lose click.

title: Wyrm
stripped_text: Interface -> 3 credits: Break 1 subroutine on a piece of ice with 0 or less strength. Interface -> 1 credit: The ice you are encountering gets -1 strength for the remainder of this encounter. 1 credit: +1 strength.

title: Yog.0
stripped_text: Interface -> 0 credits: Break 1 code gate subroutine.
